## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 articles ready for review in Airtable; more topic approvals needed](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Backlink strategy shifting focus from DevOps to backup/archive features](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Performance data showing early positive signals for recently published content](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [404 page redirects identified and ready for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [GrowthX conducting audit week next week to improve processes and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Approval

  - [10 articles ready for Flosum team review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Only 2 approved topic ideas remaining; \~120 awaiting approval](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [GrowthX team needs more approved topics to maintain content production momentum](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Flosum team to review and approve additional topics this week](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Historical focus on DevOps-related pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Recent shift (since December) towards backup and archive features](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [GrowthX team to prioritize backlinks for backup-related pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Suggestion to use high-difficulty, high-volume keywords from existing and new blog posts as backlink targets](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Looker Studio dashboard experiencing syncing issues with Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [8 published articles showing early positive signals (impressions, clicks) in GSC](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [GA4 data available for some blog posts with initial sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [All recently published blogs have been indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### 404 Page Redirects

  - [Jakub completed analysis of 404 pages with traffic or backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Redirect targets identified for pages with clicks/impressions in last 16 months](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Recommendation to update 404 page with header section for improved user experience](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Flosum team to implement redirects based on provided spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Audit Week

  - [GrowthX conducting internal audit week next week (no content publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Focus on improving backend processes, workflows, and dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Quality assurance checks on all active projects](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Opportunity for stakeholder calls to discuss progress and quality](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### Thank You Page and Blog Categories

  - [Flosum team working on new thank you page for backup and archive product](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

  - [Need to update blog post dates and ensure consistent use of table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/ZR9btUN1xLyRyeoA-wfk1ZVLdaGNu7dt?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
